- Goal model: Navigate the white cross player through the gray maze to reach the orange/blue target area.

- Plan: Try UP/DOWN to see vertical movement, then map out the path to the goal.
- Revise any item above immediately if `current_frame` or `history` contradicts it.
end of world model.
